Our Faculty

Meet Our Teachers

Experienced professionals bringing East and West together in transpersonal knowledge

Core Teachers

The heart of our training program, bringing decades of experience in transpersonal psychotherapy and breathwork

Core Teacher

Lyudmila Skartsesku

Head East

MA Transpersonal Psychotherapist EUROTAS - Moldova

President of the Association of Transpersonal Development in Moldova and certified transpersonal psychotherapist. She leads the Eastern European program with extensive experience in transpersonal psychology and breathwork. Board member of EUROTAS and coordinator of the Ethics Committee.

Her approach combines traditional Eastern wisdom with modern transpersonal methodologies, exploring shamanic states of consciousness, spiritual crisis, and quantum processes on individual and collective consciousness.

https://arasco.org/
  • Certified Transpersonal Psychotherapist
  • Holotropic Breathwork Leader in Moldova
  • Specialist in Intense Integrative Psychotherapeutic Methods
  • Board Member of EUROTAS Certification and Accreditation Committee
  • Institute of Psychoanalysis and Social Management, Moscow
  • Faculty of Russian Philology, USSR
  • President, Association of Transpersonal Development, Moldova
  • Teaches Introduction to Process Oriented Therapy
  • Leading Author's Programs in Transpersonal Psychology
  • Training programs in Moldova, Romania, Latvia
  • Research on Psychoacoustic Correction of the Brain
Core Teacher

Kati Wortelkamp

Head West

Anthropologist & Psychologist M.A. - Germany

Co-founder and Head West of the Transpersonal Training program. Based in Germany, she brings decades of experience in Holotropic Breathwork and transpersonal psychotherapy. She oversees the Western curriculum and ensures the program meets EUROTAS standards for professional transpersonal training. With over 10 years at the Cancer-Hotline (University Medical Center Freiburg), she brings deep compassion and practical expertise to therapeutic work.

www.kati-wortelkamp.de
  • Certified Holotropic Breathwork® Practitioner (Grof Transpersonal Training)
  • Certified in Grof® Legacy Training
  • Professional Member of EUROTAS
  • Innovation Trainer/Coach (motiv network, Institute of German Economy)
  • Didacted Therapy in Transpersonal Psychotherapy (Dr. Ingo Jahrsetz)
  • One Light Healing Touch - Energetic-Therapeutic-Shamanic School
  • Non-Medical Practitioner for Psychotherapy (Public Health Dept. Freiburg)
  • Person-Centered Psychotherapy (University of Freiburg)
  • Private Practice near Freiburg, Germany
  • Offering Holotropic Breathwork® Seminars for Many Years
  • 10 Years at Cancer-Hotline (University Medical Center Freiburg)
  • Extensive Practice in Bioenergetic, Kundalini and Iyengar Yoga
  • Body-Oriented Methods Specialist
Core Teacher

Prof. Jure Biechonski

Estonia

Expert in transpersonal psychology and academic research

Professor Jure Biechonski brings academic rigor and deep theoretical knowledge to our program. Based in Estonia, he is a renowned researcher and practitioner in transpersonal psychology, bridging the gap between academic research and practical application in therapeutic settings.

His work focuses on integrating transpersonal psychology principles with contemporary psychotherapeutic approaches, emphasizing the importance of consciousness studies in modern therapeutic practice. With extensive experience in both academic research and clinical applications, he offers unique insights into the theoretical foundations and practical implementations of transpersonal methods.

  • Professor in Transpersonal Psychology
  • Academic Researcher in Consciousness Studies
  • Certified Transpersonal Psychotherapist
  • Expert in Holotropic Breathwork Theory and Practice
  • Academic Teaching in Transpersonal Psychology, Estonia
  • Research in Consciousness Studies and Altered States
  • Integration of Academic Theory with Clinical Practice
  • Facilitating Transpersonal Workshops and Seminars
Core Teacher

Lilian Gscheidel

Germany

Psychologist BSc, Transpersonal Breathwork Practitioner

Core faculty member specializing in breathwork psychotherapy, gestalt therapy, and dance therapy. Works in a private practice for gestalt therapy in Berlin and offers Grof Breathwork® weekends. Living in community for many years, she brings a deeply relational and embodied approach to therapeutic work, integrating movement, breath, and consciousness exploration.

Website
www.wandel-zart-und-wild.de
  • • Certified Transpersonal Breathwork Practitioner (Dr. Ingo Jahrsetz)
  • • Certified in Grof® Legacy Training
  • • Certified Gestalt Therapist (Institut für Gestalt und Erfahrung)
  • • Certified Dance Therapist (Institut für Gestalt und Erfahrung)
  • • Psychedelic Facilitator (with Kiyumi)
  • • Psychologist BSc (University of Magdeburg)
  • • Certified Heroes Journey Facilitator
  • • Private Practice for Gestalt Therapy, Berlin
  • • Grof Breathwork® Weekend Facilitator
  • • Therapeutic Aftercare Groups for Psychosomatic Clinic Patients
  • • Living in Intentional Community for Many Years
Core Teacher

Manal Al-Hammadi

Yemen / Poland

Psychedelic Integration Facilitator & Educator

Certified Psychedelic Integration Facilitator and Educator (USA), serving as Managing Director at the Psychedelic Studies Institute in Poland. Originally from Yemen and descendant of the Queen of Sheba, she brings over a decade of experience studying psychedelics, bridging ancient wisdom with modern research. Her mission is to honor ancestral knowledge while pioneering new frontiers in psychedelic science, innovation, and mental health care with a strong focus on ethical standards.

  • • Certified Psychedelic Integration Facilitator & Educator (USA)
  • • Managing Director, Psychedelic Studies Institute (Poland)
  • • Training as Transpersonal Psychotherapist (in progress)
  • • Ph.D. Candidate: Psychedelics, Public Health & Drug Policy
  • • Over a Decade Studying Psychedelics
  • • Career in Technology and Innovation
  • • Leading Initiatives in Psychedelic Education & Training
  • • Bridging Ancestral Lineage with Modern Science
  • • Focus on Ethical Standards in Psychedelic Therapy
Core Teacher

Tina Lindhard

Spain

Ph.D. Consciousness Studies - Author & Researcher

Senior core teacher with extensive experience in meditation, craniosacral therapy, and transpersonal psychology. Based in Spain, she is an accomplished author, researcher, and public speaker on consciousness, meditation, health, and wellness. With a background spanning psychology, philosophy, and consciousness studies, she brings deep theoretical and experiential knowledge to breathwork psychotherapy. Mentor for MA and PhD students at IUPS.

Website
tinalindhard.com
Academic Degrees & Certificates
  • • Ph.D. Consciousness Studies (IUPS, Hawaii, 2016)
  • • MATP Transpersonal Psychology (Sofia University/ITP, 2013)
  • • Certificate of Transpersonal Studies (Sofia University, 2012)
  • • Diploma in Craniosacral Therapy - Biodynamic School (2005)
  • • Diploma in Family Constellation Therapy (2009)
  • • Diploma in Kinesiology Practice & Philosophy (2003)
  • • Diploma in Cranial Osteopathy (2002)
  • • BSc Social Science - Research Psychology (UCT, South Africa, 1976)
  • • Arka Dhyana Meditation Teachers Training Certificate
Selected Publications (2020)
  • • Intuition: A Heart-based Epistemology. Diálogo vol. 7,(1):181-194
  • • Mesoderm: The Possible Key to the Organic Basis of Freud's Theories. Psychology 11(11):1769-1793
  • • La Salud Mental Y La Superación De La Violencia. Salud Mental, Madrid
  • • Mentor for MA/PhD Students at IUPS (2017-present)
  • • Arka Dhyana Meditation Teacher & Facilitator (2005-present)
  • • Private Consultancy: Eclectic Therapist (2002-2013)
  • • Public Speaker on Self, Meditation, Health & Wellness
  • • Specializing in Trauma, Families, Death, Dying & Grief

Methodology Guest Teachers

International experts sharing specialized knowledge and diverse methodologies

Guest

Lev Belogorodskii

Russia

Lev Belogorodskii is an experienced transpersonal psychologist and breathwork facilitator from Russia, contributing unique perspectives from the Russian transpersonal tradition.

Guest

Liudmila Serbina

Russia

Liudmila Serbina brings extensive expertise in transpersonal psychology and therapeutic practices from the Russian school of psychology.

Guest

Dr. Ingo Benjamin Jahrsetz

Germany

Dr. Jahrsetz combines academic research with practical therapeutic experience in transpersonal psychology and consciousness studies.

Guest

Vladimir Maykov

Russia

Vladimir Maykov is a leading figure in transpersonal psychology research and practice in Russia and internationally.

Guest

Pier Luigi Lattuada

Italy

Pier Luigi Lattuada is a renowned transpersonal psychotherapist and founder of the Integral Transpersonal Institute in Italy.

Guest

Samvedam B. Randles

USA

Samvedam Randles brings American transpersonal psychology perspectives and expertise in integral and consciousness studies.

Guest

Mario Lorenzetti

Italy

Mario Lorenzetti is an experienced transpersonal psychotherapist and breathwork facilitator based in Italy.

Guest

Stephan Schillinger

France

Stephan Schillinger brings French perspectives on transpersonal psychology and holotropic breathwork practices.

Guest

Bernadette Blin

France

Bernadette Blin is a renowned breathwork practitioner and transpersonal psychotherapist from France with decades of experience.

Guest

Erik Andersen

South Africa

Erik Andersen brings transpersonal perspectives from South Africa, enriching our program with diverse cultural insights.

Guest

Cathy Geils

South Africa

Cathy Geils specializes in transpersonal approaches and breathwork therapy, bringing experience from the South African context.

Guest

Stefan Dressler

Germany

Stefan Dressler contributes expertise in breathwork facilitation and transpersonal therapeutic techniques from Germany.

Guest

Rita Aguila

Portugal

Rita Aguila brings Portuguese perspectives on transpersonal work and breathwork therapy to our international faculty.

Guest

Rainer Pervöltz

Germany

Rainer Pervöltz is an experienced transpersonal therapist and breathwork facilitator with deep knowledge of holotropic states.

Guest

Charlotte Kihl

Sweden

Charlotte Kihl brings Scandinavian perspectives on transpersonal psychology and therapeutic practices to our program.

Guest

Gabriel Fernandez-Borsot, PhD

Spain

Dr. Gabriel Fernandez-Borsot contributes academic research and clinical expertise in transpersonal psychology from Spain.

Guest

Nicolas Cambas

Ecuador / Austria

Nicolas Cambas brings a unique blend of Latin American and European perspectives on transpersonal work and consciousness exploration.

Guest

Dario Giuffrida

Italy

Dario Giuffrida is an experienced breathwork facilitator and transpersonal psychotherapist from Italy.

Guest

Kirsten Cameron

California, USA

Kirsten Cameron brings expertise from California's transpersonal psychology tradition and holotropic breathwork practice.

Guest

Ingrida Indane

Latvia

Ingrida Indane represents the Baltic tradition of transpersonal work and consciousness exploration from Latvia.

Guest

Serge Beddington

England

Serge Beddington brings British perspectives on transpersonal psychology and consciousness studies to our international team.

Guest

Lydia Maidan

Moldova

Lydia Maidan contributes to the Eastern European program with expertise in transpersonal approaches and breathwork.

Guest

Cristina Revenco

Romania

Cristina Revenco brings Romanian perspectives on transpersonal psychology and therapeutic practices.

Guest

Dennis Johnson

Austria

Dennis Johnson contributes Austrian expertise in transpersonal psychotherapy and consciousness work.

Guest

Vera Covaliciuc

Russia

Vera Covaliciuc brings experience in transpersonal psychology and therapeutic practices from Russia.
